# blastshield_egress_policies (Data Source)

Lists Blastshield egress_policys with optional filters.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all egress policies
data "blastshield_egress_policies" "all" {}

# Filter egress policies by name
data "blastshield_egress_policies" "updates" {
  name = ["allow-package-updates"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `allow_all_dns_queries` (Boolean) Filter by allow_all_dns_queries.
- `destinations` (List of String) Filter by destinations.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Filter by enabled.
- `groups` (List of Number) Filter by groups.
- `id` (List of Number) Filter by id.
- `name` (List of String) Filter by name.
- `services` (List of Number) Filter by services.
- `system_tags` (List of String) Filter by system_tags.
- `tags` (List of String) Filter by tags.

### Read-Only

- `egress_policies` (Attributes List) List of egress_policies matching the filters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--egress_policies))

<a id="nestedatt--egress_policies"></a>
### Nested Schema for `egress_policies`

Read-Only:

- `allow_all_dns_queries` (Boolean)
- `destinations` (Set of String)
- `dns_names` (Attributes Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--egress_policies--dns_names))
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `groups` (Set of Number)
- `id` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `services` (Set of Number)
- `system_tags` (Map of String)
- `tags` (Map of String)

<a id="nestedatt--egress_policies--dns_names"></a>
### Nested Schema for `egress_policies.dns_names`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)
- `recursive` (Boolean)
